choices: The newest Koopaling
Bowser’s new Koopa wife
Bowser’s newest Goomba foot soldier
Bowser’s newest Magikoopa assistant
Something else
1.content:
Bowser sat in his castle still fuming after the last loss Mario handed to him two days ago as a Magikoopa tried to cheer him up, “It’s alright your Grumpiness you really made that plumber have to work for it this time and it gave your kids a lot of fun and experience!” Bowser gave one look to the servant that made him sweat profusely and nearly choke on his own tongue as the king of Koopas closed his eyes and thought more to himself: sure Magikoopa was right but the children could learn only so much from losing constantly especially watching their dear father being beaten constantly by his greatest enemy...but that was when it hit him! He did use magic in order to create his children the most important things in his life who said magic couldn’t be used again to fix his problems with his enemies? He could do things like possibly make more children from them, more soldiers for his army as reliable ones were hard to come by,...or even a wife. With the possibilities in mind he knew to target Mario first as he spent two days using magic and natural recipes to make a cursed mushroom to be sent to him via mail making it look like it came from Peach to begin with...

The next day Mario went out to check his mail when he noticed a package with the imprint of the Mushroom Kingdom Castle on the side immediately thinking it had to be from Peach excited to see what was inside the plumber quickly pulled it open to discover a black mushroom with red eyes...Mario found it odd but ate it anyways as if Peach made it it would have to be good but instead all he tasted was an extremely burnt mushroom with some gooey sticky liquid inside that he couldn’t get out of his mouth no matter how he struggled little did he know it was making him...
1.title: The beginning

choices: Mario calls Luigi for help
Mario calls Bowser wanting answers
Mario panics not knowing what to do as he continues to change
Mario gets excited wonder what changes Papa has next (already mentally changed)
Something else
11.content: As Mario stumbled around reentering his home he made his way over to the bathroom as he felt like he was heating up and needed to splash his face with water but his reflection stopped his train of thought as he saw most of his face was now covered in green scales and two horns were protruding through his signature hat.
11.title: The newest Koopaling

choices: Follow the dream as he changes outside of it
Bowser arrives eager to see his work
Luigi shows up and attempts to help his brother
The magic works but not as planned
Something else
13.content: Bowser felt that as Mario was such a big pain in his side for so many years that he deserved to be at the bottom of the totem poll of power in his new world order and who was lower in the Koopa army than a normal Goomba? Nothing that was what as Mario started to get sleepy he made his way back inside and fell next to his bed as he started having a bad dream...
13.title: Bowser’s newest Goomba foot soldier

choices: Mario awakens from his dream.
Mario's dreamscape shifts to another scene entirely.
Something else.
131.content:
Mario felt uncharacteristically drowsy after eating the mushroom - it seemed to be a strange gift from Peach, by all accounts, and while it was sealed like a package the princess would send his way... There wasn't any further correspondence. Maybe he wasn't supposed to eat it directly, but cook it instead? "Aaaah... Mamma mia..." he yawned out, hanging up his iconic cap as he returns to his bedroom. It takes herculean effort from the plumber just to change into his pajamas before crawling into bed. All he could hope was that, by the time he woke up, that gross burnt taste would be gone...

It wasn't much longer than that before the plumber was snug in his bed, soft utterances of Italian dishes filling his room as his dreams went, as they often did, to somewhere sweet and savory. Within his dreamscape, Mario was seated at an expansive dining table, sampling dishes as they seemed to manifest upon it. This was a rather common somnolent fantasy of his - and one he delighted in. He was content to simply let it ride out until he would next awaken...

However, Mario quickly found his meal interrupted by a sudden crash. The walls around him - those which hadn't existed until he was made aware of them - were blasted apart, and through a haze of smoke and dust, he found his familiar foes marching in. Koopa Troops and Goombas worked their way inward, intent solely to ruin his meal. Mario watched initially with confusion as Bowser's forces made their way to his table and upturned it. While the surreality of the situation might have sobered him in more normal circumstances - he found himself gripped with an intense fury at seeing his food ruined. Mario leapt from his seat, and found himself staring down a Goomba - its thick brows locked in a scowl which Mario seemed to match in intensity. The Goomba charged forward - and Mario's first inclination was to jump, but he found his body rebelling against him. His legs remained firmly planted on the ground. Helpless to stop his dream meal from being ruined and now unable to stop the runaway Goomba, he felt the grumpy little mushroom impact him and knock him square on his rear.

More frustrated than he was hurt, Mario found himself... Downsized, as he was accustomed - eye-level with the Goomba as it backed up; rearing for another charge. Rather than let it just roll over him, however, Mario tried to jump again - only to, once more, fail. It was then that he came upon another idea in the spur of the moment - bracing himself, Mario leaned his shoulder forward and ran headlong toward the Goomba as well. While such an impact would be a much less favorable trade of blows for the plumber... This time, as he rammed the Goomba, he felt it fall back, disappearing into a puff of smoke just like if he'd dropped on top of it. His idea worked - and he was elated! Mario spied a Koopa Troopa nearby, and decided to put his plan into action again - running headlong at it, and lo and behold, he knocked the turtle back into its shell. More than that, the sliding shell bounced across the corners of the wrecked room and managed to knock out the rest of his uninvited guests.

When the smoke cleared, Mario was left in the ruins of the room triumphant. It might not have been particularly befitting of the vaunted jumpman, but... It worked, right? While he was happy about that, he couldn't exactly shake the anger of having been interrupted...

As his peculiar fantasy played out, Mario's sleeping body had undergone a few slight alterations. While not nearly as small as his more... Minute form typically was, Mario seems to have shrunk by a few inches - mass that seems to have redistributed elsewhere. His face seemed rounder; broader, and even a couple shades darker than normal. His brows were a bit bushier - not to mention furrowed, as his slumbering demeanor seems to have changed as well. Rather than dreamily murmur about his favorite foods, he instead seemed to be grumbling in his sleep about his bitter misfortune.
131.title: Follow the dream as he changes outside of it

choices: Mario continues to change as he gets to work
Mario snaps out of it as he runs back into the throne room

Mario finds a captured Peach who tries to appeal to him
1312.content: The plumber walked to the exit of the room inclined to submit his wrath upon more of Bowser’s minions but when he left the room he found himself in the Koopa King’s throne room as he was enjoying a similar meal. “ERAH!” Mario charged at the table but was grabbed by Bowser Junior before he could make contact with it. “Don’t disturb Dad! Go clean his bedroom before you make him really angry.” The plumber’s eyes fogged up when he was given the order as he went to go find the cleaning supplies...
1312.title: Mario's dreamscape shifts to another scene ...

choices: Mario continues to dream of serving Bowser.
Mario's snoring draws some attention.
Something else.
13121.content:
Mario's feet kicked and squirmed as he was held by the overalls, trying desperately to charge Bowser. Seeing him chowing down stoked Mario's anger to no end - if he couldn't enjoy his food, why should Bowser? The thought of retribution remained in his mind only as long as it took for Jr. to issue his command - after which, Mario could feel his body go stiff, as though absorbing the younger Koopa's command into his very essence.

As soon as his feet touched the ground, Mario felt himself move as though on autopilot. He walked through the drab, grey brick corridors of Bowser's fortress thoughtlessly, but with the vague sense of security in where he would end up. Soon he found himself before a heavy steel door, and behind it lay... A surprisingly benign closet of cleaning supplies. Mario's brow furrowed as he began to pile items onto a cart - he recognized that he was acting oddly, and the thought of cleaning Bowser's room definitely felt strange, but he just couldn't stop himself. Rather - he couldn't muster enough... Motivation to stop himself.

Mario pushed the cart down the halls - passing patrolling Koopa Troopas on the way. They paid him no mind - not even regarding his presence with a sense of surprise or novelty. He just blended in, like he belonged there.

Eventually he arrived at Bowser's room, gated by a set of massive doors - even more imposing to the still-diminutive plumber - with a stone bust of the Koopa king glowering down at him from above the doorway. Mario felt his body quake at the sight, quickly averting his eyes. Usually the sight of his archnemesis inspired a bold sense of resistance, but... Admittedly, he couldn't shake a sense of intimidation from where he was standing now.

Bowser's room was... Very much scaled to the Koopa's size - making all of the furniture loom over Mario. Despite this, he quickly got to work, grabbing a broom and beginning to sweep a fine coating of ash on the floor into neat piles, beginning to scrub scorch marks off of the brick... Eventually he managed to clamber up to Bowser's bed - the thought of simply jumping up to it not occurring to him - and he started to tidy up the sheets, but... As Mario leaned down to do so, he found his body compelled to do so oddly. Rather than reach down with his hands, Mario found himself taking a corner of the sheets in his teeth, starting to drag it into place. Strange as it was, Mario felt like it was... Preferable, so by the time he was ready to hit the next corner, he did it again, and again...

Working with his mouth became much easier than using his hands - using it to grip tools with a surprising sense of ease. When his mouth was empty, Mario started to huff and grumble. Even if the work was easier, it was still frustrating to do. He didn't like it - but started to think he had no choice in the matter. What else could he do - stand up to Bowser? ... He couldn't do that, right...?

In reality, Mario's mouth yawned open wide - wider than was normally possible for the plumber. His head and mouth had become considerably broader - distinctly oversized, and the beginnings of a fang poked out past his lower lip. He'd begun to snore loudly, interrupted occasionally by a grumpy grumble. Beneath the covers, his arms were wrapped around his body - and even then, the sleeves of his pajamas had come to cover them entirely; his arms starting to grow smaller while his head and even his feet grew disproportionately larger. By now, anyone could notice something was distinctly wrong with him - but the question was, would anyone notice before it's too late...?
13121.title: Mario continues to change as he gets to work

131212.content: It took some time but Mario’s loud snoring finally brought the attention of...
131212.title: Mario's snoring draws some attention.

choices: Mario is awoken by the noise outside.
Bowser had prepared something to change Mario further.
Bowser has something else planned...
1312123.content:
The quiet sputter of a Koopa Clown Car filled the air outside of Mario's house as Bowser flew overhead, navigating to the nearby forest to land. After all - the last thing he wanted to do was alert the plumber to his presence. As hulking as he was - Bowser liked to think he could be stealthy if he wanted to.

Ignoring the thundering thud booming out into the forest around him as he hopped out of his clown car, and the heavy pounding of his footsteps as he makes his way to the clearing Mario's home rested in, and even ignoring the fact that the tree he elected to hide behind covered only the slightest sliver of his body, Bowser surveyed the home for any sign of his arch-nemesis. The Koopa quickly observed he wasn't out and about, so he crept - quietly as he was (un)able - to the nearest window.

Bowser's brow quirked as he peered inside; a strange and delightful sight awaiting him. He saw Mario in bed - the only thing poking out of his sheets being his now-oversized, tan-colored head. Bowser gave a wicked grin - his plan was working! Sure, Mario wasn't quite finished yet, but this was a good sign of things to come.

Everything seemed to be going according to plan...
1312123.title: Bowser who originally came to see the changes i...

choices: Mario’s drowsiness gets the better of him as he falls back to sleep
Option one but stay with Bowser and Luigi
Mario runs outside and attacks Bowser
Option three but Mario attacks Luigi instead
Bowser pulls out a mushroom and tries to force Luigi to eat it
13121231.content:
Bowser probably should’ve stayed home as his impatience and loudness managed to wake the partially transformed plumber up as he looked around in anger trying to identify the source of the disturbance. “WHOEVER WOKE ME UP IS GOING TO BE BITTEN!” Him being loud, angry, talkative, and thinking of biting instead of jumping were all good signs for Bowser that the transformation process was working however he knew it was much faster when the victim was asleep as he went to leave so Mario would fall back to sleep he suddenly found the foot of Luigi in his face.

“AGH!” Bowser stepped backwards hitting his back against the wall as Luigi made it home from a hard day of work, “I don’t know what you want Bowser but I’ma send you home crying!”
13121231.title: Mario is awoken by the noise outside.

choices: Luigi contacts the princess.
Luigi contacts E. Gadd.
Luigi looked into it... But didn't exactly want to help.
131212313.content:
Bowser fell back on his shell as Luigi's boot was planted firmly in his face - the spikes upon it digging into the ground. The Koopa king huffed and rolled backward until he was on his feet again, smoke rising from his nostrils. "Hmph! Just my luck that the other one would mess things up..." he huffs. Luigi seemed to be rearing up for another leap at the Koopa, but Bowser spat a fireball his way, dissuading the approach. Admittedly, he only wanted to observe his newest minion for now, but with Luigi in the way, Bowser couldn't help but wonder if it's better to collect him now...

The two exchanged blows - Bowser being thrown around the yard, and Luigi ending up with more than a few singes on his overalls. The two huffed as they stared each-other down - and just then, the door was thrown open.

"HEY! What's all the racket!?" a familiar, but... Gruff voice called, and out from the doorway waddled Mario. He was still dressed in his pajamas - but with as much as his body had changed, they sat... Oddly upon his frame. The pants were bunched up around his ankles, and his shirt hung low enough to cover his legs as well. His sleeves sat largely empty, and his face - much more noticeable on his much larger head - sat in a frustrated scowl. His eyes flicked between his brother and Bowser - and while he gave a leer toward Luigi, he instead began to waddle toward Bowser.

"Hah! There he is. Come here..." Bowser bellows, extending a clawed finger toward Mario commandingly. The half-Goombafied plumber did as commanded, approaching closer... And, as he neared Bowser's finger, he leaned forward and chomped on it. The Koopa yelps, retracting his hand and pulling Mario with it. With a heavy pitch, Bowser flings Mario toward his brother, knocking the two onto the ground. "I can see you need a bit more work. And I need a bandage, that little runt's got some bite in him." With his uninjured hand, Bowser snaps his fingers, and his clown car hovers down from above. Clambering into it, Bowser flies off with an ominous "See you again soon - gwahahahah!"

As the clown car flew out of sight, Mario gave a sharp cry of "And stay gone!" followed by a sharp huff.

Luigi, on the other hand, was in disbelief. Beyond just recognizing his clothes - Luigi could still see quite a bit of Mario's features on the... Thing before him. His blue eyes, his moustache, round nose, and hair - all of it very clearly belonged to his brother. The way Bowser was talking made it seem like he had something to do with it. "Bro... What happened to you?"

"What happened? I was havin' a great dream before you knuckleheads ruined it!" he huffs. He leaps back up onto his feet and begins to make his way indoors before Luigi stops him.

"D-don't you think something's... Different about you?" Luigi suggests.

Mario grumbles under his breath. "Yeah. Now I'm tired and hungry." he huffs.

Something was clearly wrong here, Luigi recognized - now the question was, what he could do about it.
131212313.title: Mario runs outside and attacks Bowser

choices: E Gadd is outside ready to help Luigi
E Gadd is outside more Magikoopa than man ready to help Bowser
Bowser is attacking the home knowing he could help Mario
Luigi didn’t have the directions right causing them to get lost
The Koopalings arrive intent on slowing them down and making Mario sleep
1312123132.content: Luigi couldn’t just stand back and watch his brother in his current state as he contacted the person whom he believed could help him the most: Professor E Gadd. Sure the Doctor was quite eccentric but he could handle that if it meant Mario would be back to normal. “Hey bro I think a friend of mine has some great food you’d like!” That got the angry plumber’s attention as ran over to Luigi causing him to be flipped into the air and land on top of his brother’s head as he seemingly made Luigi guide him to the professor’s home...
1312123132.title: Luigi contacts E. Gadd.

choices: Wendy attempts to hypnotize the two.
Morton attempts to scare Luigi with a group of Boos.
Larry attempts to trap Luigi in a cursed Koopa shell.
13121231325.content:
Mario and Luigi made their way to E. Gadd's lab - it was quite a ways away on-foot, and while they were used to legging it, the trip there wasn't particularly easy. The road was long and winding, moving through woodland and veering into much denser recesses of it - where the doctor could perform his experiments unsupervised uninterrupted. For Luigi, this was a bit of a problem due to his skittish demeanor, and for Mario - well, he was just unhappy that he was getting dragged out of the house. "This guy better be a gourmet chef - nobody else is worth this trip." he grumbles.

Far overhead, a trio of clown cars hovered in the sky, carrying Wendy, Morton, and Larry Koopa. When Bowser returned to his castle, he was livid that Mario was still keen to disobey him - and ordered the Koopalings out to find some way to finish his changes. The Koopalings moved out as a group... But when they arrived at the house, nobody was there. Not wanting to disappoint Bowser, they split up into three groups - searching for where they might've gone.

Peering through a telescope, Larry calls out. "There!" he bellows, motioning down to the woods. Through the telescope, he can see the plumbers on the road.

"Finally." Wendy gripes, rolling her eyes. "It's about time we found them - how hard is it to spot a loser and a half-Goomba freak, anyway?"

Morton leans forward in his clown car, almost enough to tip it over. "Awright - let's get to it!" He booms, ready to dive down - but Larry maneuvers his clown car in front of him.

"W-wait! Don't you remember the plan? We're not just here to beat 'em up and leave!" Larry protests.

Morton scratches his head - then perks up, nodding. "Oh yeah, right..."

Wendy's clown car hovers past the two, and she beckons for them to follow. "C'mon, let's get ahead of them. I can't wait to get rid of those pesky plumbers."

With that, the Koopalings move further down the path, lying in wait for Mario and Luigi. When the two finally came upon them - the Koopalings were ready to spring a trap for them.

The koopaling was unsure of what the victim would become as he didn’t take part in the process of making the shell but he wanted to prove himself capable regardless as Morton was waiting ahead in case he failed while Wendy was given the goal of taking care of the Doctor.

1312123132535.title: More options

choices: "What do you mean, bro?" He's changed mentally.
"What did you do!?" Luigi's mind is unchanged.
Follow Wendy taking care of E. Gadd.
13121231325354.content:
Larry had situated himself by a curve in the road - keeping an eye out for the plumbers as they approached. Idly, he tossed the shell between his hands - even if it was cursed, it appeared rather benign; just looking like a green Koopa shell. Eventually Larry's wait came to an end as the brothers rounded the curve - at first, Larry was a little worried about the trap - Luigi seemed jittery, looking fearfully at the darkened woods around him, wary of any surprises...

But, as a twig snapped nearby, Luigi jerked in its direction, sensing a threat... In the exact opposite direction of the Koopaling. With a wicked grin, Larry capitalized on the distraction, lobbing the shell in the plumbers' direction. It sailed in a straight line - giving off a shower of shapes Larry had come to associate with the Magikoopas' work. Before Luigi could even react, the shell made impact - and the green-hatted plumber was quickly surrounded with a puff of smoke before being sucked into the shell.

It landed with a thud - and the half-Goombafied Mario hit the ground next to it with a sharp "Oof!"; displaced from riding on his brother.

Suddenly, a set of spikes erupted from the formerly-smooth surface of the shell - and once more it began to give off a magical aura; already getting to work. By the time Larry stepped out from his hiding place, he could already see a squat yellow tail poking out from it.

A queasy sound escapes the shell - Luigi's voice warbling as its pitch lowers. Larry walks past the dazed Mario to observe the shell as it works - and as more of the plumber is revealed. One of his arms soon popped free of the shell's confines - a broad, squat limb covered in yellow scales and ending with clawed fingers. His other arm came free soon after - and his legs were revealed next - a mirror image of Larry's own. A shock of red hair poked out of the very top of it - but Luigi's head didn't easily follow. It took Larry grabbing the hair and pulling upward, like he was uprooting a vegetable, for the altered plumber's face to be revealed.

A dizzy expression sat upon a familiar face - but not that of Luigi's own. He bore the same tan muzzle as bowser, but his head was otherwise covered with green scales, and two round horns curled upward from either side of his head. He reached up to hold his head wearily, and Larry couldn't help but laugh.

"That was easier than I thought it'd be!" he boasts, placing his hands on his hips.

Luigi blinked a few times, then shook his head, trying to regain his senses. The first thing his eyes fell upon was his hands, and from there, he looked up to Larry in confusion.
13121231325354.title: Luigi is hit as he becomes a Koopaling

choices: She would be brainwashed into helping E Gadd

131212313253543.content: While the plumbers were fighting a losing battle the lone female Koopaling was trying to break into the home of Professor E Gadd with great difficulty as he managed to send out multiple robots to fight off the would be intruder however they were primarily built to battle ghosts so it wasn’t too much for Wendy to handle on her own. “When I get to you I’m going to make sure you are a lowly servant for making me work so hard!” What she failed to realize however was that during all that fighting E Gadd managed to set up a new device he recently built behind his front door so that when she would step inside she would be hit and...
131212313253543.title: Follow Wendy taking care of E. Gadd.

choices: The doctor uses Wendy in an experiment.
The doctor has Wendy find Luigi.
Wendy snaps out of hypnosis when the doctor least expects it.
1312123132535431.content:
Wendy was at her wits' end trying to get into the doctor's house. The rickety-looking shack was surprisingly sturdy - she'd tried barging down the door and even lobbing fireballs at it with her wand, but something about it made it absurdly durable. To say she's made no progress would be an understatement - in fact, alerting the doctor to her presence actively worked against her favor.

Inside, the doctor was setting up a tripod, and mounding a large, blocky device reminiscent of an antiquated camera. He fiddled with it for a little bit - adjusting its flashbulb and extending the accordion-like end of it. When all was set, he grabbed a button, connected to the camera-like device by a wire, and ran to the door in an interval between Wendy's attacks. All the doctor had to do was release a single bolt, and the door was ready to open. Before the Koopaling could knock it down, he ran around a corner, holding the button and waiting for the inevitable...

Crash!

Wendy managed to shoulder-check the door open, stumbling in... And finding herself face-to-lens with the camera. Taking the sudden entrance as his cue, the doctor activates the camera, and a bright flash filled his entranceway. When he finally peeked around his cover, he saw Wendy standing in place, wide-eyed and dazed. Her eyes bore distinct spirals; entirely entranced by the evidently-hypnotic effect of the device.

"Wonderful! It seemed the neural recombobulator worked!" he says excitedly, walking up to the hypnotized Koopaling. "How're you feeling, there? Aggressive? Violent? Angry in any way?"

Wendy dumbly shook her head 'no', displacing a dollop of drool that'd come to form upon her puffy lips.

"Superb! Now that you've been pacified, let's see if we can put you to work. In fact, I have something perfect in mind..."
1312123132535431.title: She would be brainwashed into helping E Gadd

choices: Wendy and E Gadd spot Luigi and Mario fighting the other Koopalings
Wendy and E Gadd spot Luigi and Mario working with the Koopalings
Wendy and E Gadd are forced into an air battle with Roy Koopa
Wendy’s mind control starts to weaken forcing E Gadd to make her go back
Something else
13121231325354312.content: As much as he liked having a ‘willing’ test subject he knew the priority should be helping Luigi and his brother who could be going through who knows what at the moment because he did owe Luigi a lot and the Professor wasn’t one to let someone down after they did so many impossible things for him. “Now Mrs Koopa we need to help the plumbers and stop your father’s plans.” Wendy nodded as she grabbed the scientist which took him a bit by surprise as she whistled calling the Clown Car she used over as she jumped in and flew off to find the brothers currently being transformed.
13121231325354312.title: The doctor has Wendy find Luigi.

choices: E. Gadd snags one of the brothers and returns to his lab.
E. Gadd and Wendy are blown out of the sky and captured.
Wendy finds the new Koopaling more intriguing than the doctor's orders.
131212313253543122.content:
The ride in the clown car was slightly uncomfortable - Wendy took up most of the room inside of it, so the doctor was somewhat squished into the thing. While Wendy was still well under his control, the initial dizziness seems to have worn off - so her gaze was keen as she scanned the forest. "There!" she barks out, pointing down to a clearing below, where the Koopalings seemed to have congregated. She swooped down to get a better view - and what the doctor saw was downright startling.

Larry seemed to be sitting opposite the newly-minted Koopaling, twisting and twirling his wand in front of the former plumber, whose eyes seemed to be glowing in the same shade as the wand. While he seemed to have changed thoroughly - the fact that shreds of Luigi's clothing seemed to decorate his limbs gave a grim indication to the doctor.

Morton, on the other hand, was making a... Creative use of his own wand. He pointed it nearby - and seemed to conjure the illusion of a Toad. As soon as it appeared, a squat little creature nearby charged forward - ramming into the fake Toad and causing it to disappear in a cloud of smoke. Based on what Luigi had told him, the doctor knew full well what to expect - but even then, he was disarmed to realize that it was Mario.

Mario seemed to have slipped out of his clothes - revealing a greatly-downsized body, and disproportionately large feet; both dwarfed by his now fully-Goomba-shaped head. His nose and moustache were still prominent upon his grumpy visage, but it seems that the Koopalings had started to take advantage of his new, aggressive demeanor...

"Just get me close!" the doctor commands. From his lab coat, he pulls out a rather simple-looking device - an extendable grabber-arm, which he hangs over the side of the clown car. "I'd rather not get in a scrap with those rapscallions, but let's try to rescue the brothers!"

Wendy lowered the car - and the Koopalings quickly picked up on it. Larry and Morton scratched their heads as they looked up - but as soon as E. Gadd's grabber swung past them, they realized it wasn't their sister returning with a captive. "Hey!" Morton boomed. "What's the big idea, sis?"

Wendy gave no response, and instead continued to steer the car closer.

Huffing, Larry moved over to the koopafied Luigi, slapping him to sober him from his hypnotic trance. "Hey, numbskull - we got a goody-two-shoes to beat. Liven up!" he commands - and in response, Luigi gives a slow nod.

"Uh... Huh? Yeah, whatever you say..." he mutters dazedly, looking up... Only to be narrowly missed by E. Gadd's grabber. He ducks into his shell to avoid it, and when he pokes his head out of it, it's with a much more fearsome expression. A goody-two-shoes, huh? Larry had been... Intimately instructing him on what to do with those kinds of folks... Luigi reared back and spat a green-tinged fireball at the clown car above him - grazing it and leaving a simmering scorch mark upon its white surface.

"Wha- careful!" the doctor yelps, and Wendy nods in response, getting ready for another pass...
131212313253543122.title: Wendy and E Gadd spot Luigi and Mario working w...

choices: The manage to blast the heroes out of the sky
Once at the home Wendy takes on her brothers while E Gadd works on Mario
Bowser arrives making things much more difficult for E Gadd
Elsewhere Peach gets a mushroom that says it’s from Mario
Once E Gadd and Wendy make it inside ghosts appear to fight the Koopalings
1312123132535431221.content: All the Koopalings began to shoot fireballs at the duo now making grabbing a victim extremely difficult however the current Goomba Mario proved he could only be dangerous if he could ram into someone so he was grabbed, “LET ME GO GOODIE TWO SHOES!” The former plumber was furious as the scientist and Koopaling flew off as the others went to their clown cars to follow with Larry reluctantly having to share with Luigi.
1312123132535431221.title: E. Gadd snags one of the brothers and returns t...

choices: They land together, and are caught by the Koopalings.
They land together, and aren't found.
They land separated from each-other.
13121231325354312211.content:
As the Koopalings departed in hot pursuit of the doctor, their chase was... Somewhat staggered by the new addition to the crew. Larry and Luigi's clown car swayed through the skies as the two Koopalings riding inside bickered and vied for a frontal position. "Hey, outta the way! I can't see!" Luigi protests - his dumbfounded demeanor shaken off in favor of a newfound sense of zeal.

"Sit still, will ya? And stop tryin' to steer!" Larry bickers back, trying to swat away Luigi's hands as he reaches out.

Morton, for better or worse, didn't have as much of an issue. Chasing after Wendy - helping the good guys, for a reason he couldn't fathom - felt strange, but he had no qualms knocking some sense into her. Wendy seemed to be bee-lining back to E. Gadd's lab - soon, they began to pass over the very depths of the woods. Morton leered as he tried to keep up - and as he got into position... He spat a heavy fireball their way, slamming headlong into the back of their clown car. The force caused the vehicle to tip over - and with a trio of cries, Wendy, E. Gadd, and Mario tumbled into the forest below, rustling branches as they landed.

"We got 'em!" Morton cried triumphantly, looking over the edge of his clown car... "But, uh, where'd they go...?" The dense canopy made it much harder to locate them - so there was no telling where they landed. Morton looked over to the bickering pair and barked "Hey!" before pointing down to the woods below. "We gotta leg it - find 'em before they get lost!"
13121231325354312211.title: The manage to blast the heroes out of the sky

choices: Follow E Gadd and Mario
Follow Wendy as she pulls out the mind control device
Follow Wendy as she repairs all the robots
E Gadd is in for a shock as Bowser is in his lab
Things are further complicated as King Boo appears knowing Luigi is ‘gone’
131212313253543122112.content: The Koopalings should’ve thought things out more as they now had a vast forest to look through which E Gadd was quite familiar with considering how close to his home it was so when he landed with the other two guiding them back was just a sinch as E Gadd and Mario went inside to test some methods to fix him while Wendy began preparing for the arrival of her brothers.
131212313253543122112.title: They land together, and aren't found.

choices: Wendy activates the robots with no issue.
Wendy ends up stuck in one of the charging stations and is turned into a robot!
Wendy's activates another machine... Filled with goo?
1312123132535431221123.content:
While the doctor prepared Mario for his experiments, he'd left Wendy with a set of instructions - a checklist to set up the house's defenses in case her brothers end up knocking - or, more likely, pounding - at his door. Her first responsibility was to set up a number of defensive machines - among them, automated security robots.

Superficially, it seemed to be a daunting task. The robots were contained in charging stations, which seemed to rattle and spark with electricity, but... Overall, it was it was rather easy to do - as simple as wrenching a few of the robots' parts into place, that a few knobs were turned in just the right manner... And, even entranced as she was, Wendy was no less capable than she'd ever been. She'd been somewhat quiet for the time - with most of her thoughts stymied by an oppressive compulsion simply to obey the doctor. Any thought that ran through her head was referenced with the doctor's wishes before it even had a chance to continue - so any aspirations of disloyalty or even questioning her actions simply stopped before they gained any traction.

Wendy continued on to repair a robot - wiping a bit of grease off of her forehead as she continued to serve as a glorified mechanic. The clunky little thing had several busted parts, which she had to replace before lugging it back into is charging station. If she were in a keener state of mind, she might wonder why the doctor let his creations fall into such disrepair - but as she was now, she didn't even consider such an inquiry.
1312123132535431221123.title: Follow Wendy as she repairs all the robots

choices: Follow the Koopalings as they are separated and fighting robots
Stay with E Gadd as he continues turning Mario back to normal
Follow Bowser as he peeps for the next target for conversion
13121231325354312211231.content: Once she was finished getting them put together she activated the robots as she was quickly scanned by one and deemed not a threat but an ally to the Doctor they left to search out the woods for the Koopalings as Wendy went inside to see E Gadd had made significant progress as Mario’s head was back to normal, “Just a few more minutes...”
13121231325354312211231.title: Wendy activates the robots with no issue.

choices: Princess Peach
Princess Daisy
Someone else.
131212313253543122112313.content:
After he'd trusted the Koopalings with capturing Mario, Bowser had turned his attention elsewhere. Truthfully, he didn't truly want to - but Bowser was confident enough in his plan that even they wouldn't have any trouble doing his bidding. Given what Bowser had seen of the plumber's changes, he figured it wouldn't be long until he was fully converted - and from there, out of his way for good. Not even his wimp of a brother could change that.

So, with the arrogance confidence of a man with a plan, Bowser began his next plot. Mario's change had gone swimmingly as far as he was concerned - so the next natural course of action was to start expanding his empire, and to do that, he had his sights set on royalty. If the ruling monarch was rendered into a brainwashed minion, then not only would he have no trouble conquering their kingdom, but he'd even have more fodder to do it with!

Bowser gave a grim chuckle as he began to develop his next trap - with the perfect target in mind...
131212313253543122112313.title: Follow Bowser as he peeps for the next target f...

1312123132535431221123131.content: The princess he loved oh so much Peach would finally come to serve him although through means of magic rather than free will like he believed would’ve happened eventually (not). The Koopa King decided he needed to see it all go down in person as he went with a Magikoopa and used a spell to disguise themselves as Toads as they carried a unlabeled package to the door of Peach’s room and dropped it before knocking on the door and running around the corner, inside the box contained a ring that would transform anyone who’d wear it into a Koopa ideal for Bowser to marry but to the ruler’s horror he spotted Toadsworth answering from the other side of the door as he inspected the package...
1312123132535431221123131.title: Princess Peach

info.brief_description: Bowser feels the need for more soldiers so he makes some out of Mario and friends
info.description:
Bowser fed up with constantly losing and feeling the need for more men and women in his army decides to use his knowledge in magic and technology to change Mario and friends into loyal servants taking part in many different positions in his army.

Rules:
No vore, unbirthing, etc

All characters are of age in the story

Bowser is aiming to transform his enemies he will not target his own army unless they betray him

No fattening, gigantification, shrinking, etc.

Bowser is trying to expand his army so make sure to transform people into creatures known to serve Bowser, Koopas, or a machine typically seen in his army

No toilet humor, diapers, poop stuff, feet fetish, or fart fetish

Sex is allowed but put a warning at the beginning of the chapter

No characters from franchises outside of the Mario franchise

With all this in mind have fun and I look forward to writing with you all!
